message:
fix(vdbe): update test_set_snapshot_stores_time_travel_marker for new SetSnapshot requirements

The SetSnapshot opcode now requires VersionStore, CommitLog, and GC
horizon to be set on the engine (added in 6e74558). This test was still
using the old "marker-only" setup without any of these, causing it to
fail with "SetSnapshot: VersionStore not available for time-travel".

Wire up MockMvccPager transaction, VersionStore, CommitLog (with entries
1..=5), and GC horizon so the test exercises the full SetSnapshot path
and verifies both marker storage and cursor upgrade.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
